def negative_python_perf_layer_network_calls_dns_or_url_parse_repeated_per_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_network_calls_dns_or_url_parse_repeated_per_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Network calls. Flag repeated DNS, URL parsing, or endpoint normalization for stable upstreams."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
